Source.description: The application or component that generated this error.

ReasonCode.description: Reason code is a unique constant identifying the error case encountered during request processing.

Description.description: Human-readable short description of the reasonCode

Details.description: Optional detailed description provides information about data received and calculated during request processing.  This helps the user to diagnose errors.

Recoverable.description: Recoverable flag indicates whether this error is always returned for this request, or retrying could change the outcome.  For example, 'true' or 'false'.
